entities.name: Entity Extraction
entities.context: Process of identifying and categorizing entities from text documents

entities.name: Knowledge System
entities.context: System for processing, storing, and managing structured knowledge from documents

entities.name: Direct LLM Processing
entities.context: First stage where content is analyzed using conversational LLM

entities.name: Structured Extraction
entities.context: Second stage where information is extracted into knowledge reservoirs

entities.name: Sync Analysis
entities.context: Third stage where LLM reasoning identifies contradictions, supersessions, and updates

entities.name: Manual Reconciliation
entities.context: Fourth stage where user reviews sync report and approves changes

entities.name: Reservoir Updates
entities.context: Final stage where approved changes are applied to knowledge base

entities.name: Subject-Predicate-Object Triples
entities.context: Fact representation format stored in facts.jsonl

entities.name: LLM
entities.context: Large Language Model used for processing and analysis
